name: SelectionControl
description: Selection controls capture choices: checkboxes for multi-select, radio buttons for one-of-many, and switches for instant on/off settings. Choosing the right one tells the operator how the choice behaves.
keyRule: Checkbox = select none/some/all and apply on submit. Radio = pick exactly one from a small set. Switch = toggle a setting that takes effect immediately.

variants.name: Checkbox
variants.whenToUse: Independent multi-select (table row selection, opt-in lists). Header checkbox does select-all + indeterminate.

variants.name: Radio button
variants.whenToUse: One choice from a short, mutually exclusive set (2–5).

variants.name: Switch
variants.whenToUse: An immediate on/off setting (e.g. enable notifications).

anatomy.name: Selected mark
anatomy.description: checkmark, inner dot, or thumb position.

anatomy.name: Indeterminate mark
anatomy.description: a dash on a checkbox when a group is partially selected.

anatomy.name: Label
anatomy.description: what the choice means; the whole label is a click target.

behaviors.name: Indeterminate
behaviors.description: When some-but-not-all of a group is checked, the parent checkbox shows a dash; clicking it selects or clears the whole group.

behaviors.name: Apply timing
behaviors.description: Checkboxes/radios usually apply when the form is submitted; switches apply instantly. Don't mix the metaphors.

behaviors.name: Grouping
behaviors.description: Radios share a name so only one is active; provide a group label.

states.treatment: Primary fill + mark; switch track/thumb primary.

specs.value: primary (#F47735); mark/thumb contrast handled by the control

props.name: type
props.description: Discriminates the three control kinds documented in this spec.

props.name: label
props.description: What the choice means; the whole label is a click target.

props.name: checked
props.description: Selected state. For switches this maps to aria-checked / mdc-switch--selected.

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Checkbox-only: shows a dash when some-but-not-all of a group is checked.

props.name: name
props.description: Required for radio groups so only one is active.

props.name: id
props.description: Associates the control with its label.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when the control's selected state changes.

doThis: Use a switch only for instant-effect settings.
Use the indeterminate state for partial group selection.
dontDoThis: Don't use radios for more than ~5 options — use a select.
Don't use a switch where users expect to Save.
Don't rely on colour alone to show selection.
accessibility: Native inputs with associated labels; groups use fieldset/legend or radiogroup.
The indeterminate checkbox sets the indeterminate property.
State is conveyed by the mark and to assistive tech, not by colour alone.

related.name: Menu
related.why: Single choice from many options — use a select/menu
